items.title: Sennheiser’s new Momentum 5 headphones have upgraded ANC and a replaceable battery
items.summary: Nearly four years after the last version of Sennheiser's Momentum headphones debuted with a redesign that traded a retro aesthetic for a more contemporary and comfortable design...

items.title: The Electric Ferrari Luce Is Finally Here
